headline: Taiwan Dollar Plunges to 14-Month Low vs Dollar

headline: CFTC Nears Clarity Act By August 31 Deadline

Bitcoin Magazine

CFTC Chair Says Clarity Act Is ‘So Close’ As August Deadline Nears
